publications.title: Event Management System for College Symposium and Events with Facial Recognition Image Sharing System
publications.publisherFull: International Research Journal of Modernization in Engineering Technology and Science
publications.description: Proposed and developed a smart Event Management System (EMS) integrated with an AI-powered Facial Recognition-Based Image Sharing System (FRISS). The platform streamlines the complete event lifecycle including registration, QR-based check-ins, scheduling, secure image sharing, and GDPR-compliant consent management.
publications.abstract: The system leverages Next.js, Convex, Clerk, Razorpay, TensorFlow, and Cloudinary to automate event workflows and deliver personalized image galleries using facial recognition. It demonstrates a scalable, privacy-conscious, and user-centric approach to academic event digitization.

achievements.title: SPOT Recognition
achievements.description: Awarded the SPOT Recognition for designing AI agents and automation solutions that streamlined internal processes, improved operational efficiency, strengthened cross-team collaboration, and drove innovation within the Automation CoE team.
